overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a bustling medieval town. The character traverses open squares, passes by a central fountain, descends through market areas, and navigates narrow alleyways before entering a dimly lit interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: main town square with stone bank building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cobblestone square following guards in red armor toward the large stone building

notable_agents.action: guards in red armor walking ahead of Geralt toward the bank building

entered.detail: large stone building with three arched doorways and decorative facade
half-timbered medieval houses with dark wooden beams
wooden fence railing along a small bridge or canal edge
stone bridge with archway crossing over a water channel

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit medieval town square with cobblestone paving, following guards toward an imposing stone bank building with arched entrances. Half-timbered houses line the right side while a wooden railing borders a water channel on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central gazebo and fountain

events.description: turns right away from the stone bank building toward the open plaza
approaches the wooden gazebo fountain structure in the plaza center

agents.ego_description: turns right at the square and walks toward the gazebo, passing pedestrians in medieval dress

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking alongside the path

entered.detail: octagonal wooden gazebo with pointed roof covering a central fountain
tall brick church wall with narrow windows visible behind trees
low stone retaining wall with planted flowers on top

segments.scene_description: Turning right from the main square, Geralt enters a sunlit plaza featuring a prominent wooden gazebo with a fountain at its center. The area is surrounded by trees and flower beds, with a brick church wall visible in the background and townspeople strolling about.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated garden path with stairs overlooking the city

events.description: begins ascending wooden stairs to upper overlook
reaches top of stairs with panoramic view of lower town

agents.ego_description: walks up wooden stairs alongside a stone wall, passing the gazebo and gaining elevation

entered.detail: wooden staircase with railings leading up to an elevated walkway
stone building with large ornate stained glass windows

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a wooden staircase alongside a stone retaining wall, moving from the open plaza into a tree-shaded elevated path. The gazebo falls behind as he climbs toward an overlook with views of the lower town, passing a building with distinctive stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower market square with timber tavern and merchant stalls

events.description: descends wooden stairs into lower market area
children running and playing in the market square

agents.ego_description: descends the stairs into a bustling lower market where children play and merchants tend stalls

notable_agents.action: children running and playing games in the market square

entered.detail: wooden market stall with red and white striped awning
large two-story half-timbered building serving as a tavern or inn

segments.scene_description: Descending into a lower market square, Geralt enters a lively area with cobblestone ground, a prominent half-timbered inn ahead, and market stalls with red awnings to the side. Children play in the open space while townspeople browse the goods.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway between timber buildings with overhead scaffolding

events.description: enters narrow alleyway between tall timber buildings
light dims significantly under scaffolding and building overhangs

agents.ego_description: navigates through tight cobblestone alleys between tall buildings, passing under scaffolding

entered.detail: tall stone and timber walls of buildings creating a narrow passage
wooden construction scaffolding with planks crossing overhead
white cloth sheets hanging on lines between buildings
dark wooden door set in a stone doorway at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: Leaving the open market, Geralt enters a narrow, shadowed alleyway enclosed by tall timber and stone building walls. He passes under wooden scaffolding with laundry hanging overhead, moving toward a wooden door at the alley's end as the natural light dims significantly.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit interior room with stone walls and wooden furniture

events.description: opens wooden door and enters building interior
lighting shifts to warm artificial candlelight and firelight

agents.ego_description: opens the wooden door and steps into a dimly lit room with stone walls and wooden tables

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the interior room
wooden tables and benches arranged in the room
warm light source from candles or fireplace illuminating the back wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt opens the wooden door at the alley's end and enters a dimly lit interior space. The environment shifts dramatically from the narrow outdoor alley to a stone-walled room illuminated by warm candlelight, containing wooden tables and a visible light source near the back wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit medieval town that gradually transitions from open, bustling squares into a secluded, dimly lit interior. It begins in a bright cobblestone square, following guards toward a stone bank building flanked by half-timbered houses and a water channel. As the camera turns right, the scene opens into a vibrant plaza centered around a wooden gazebo and fountain before ascending a wooden staircase toward a tree-shaded overlook and stained glass windows. The perspective then descends into a lively market square filled with red-awninged stalls and playing children, before shifting into a narrow, shadowed alleyway enclosed by tall walls and hanging laundry. Finally, the camera passes through a wooden door, moving from the dim outdoor corridor into a stone-walled room illuminated by the warm glow of candlelight.
